title: Intel Announces It Is Joining Musk's Terafab Project
snippet: Intel is joining Elon Musk's Terafab project, a chip manufacturing effort for Tesla, SpaceX and xAI. Intel will help Musk's companies "refactor" the technology in a chip factory, according to a post on X. Ed Ludlow repo…
contentText: Intel is joining Elon Musk's Terafab project, a chip manufacturing effort for Tesla, SpaceX and xAI. Intel will help Musk's companies "refactor" the technology in a chip factory, according to a post on X. Ed Ludlow reports on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Broadcom Rises After TPU Supply Partnership With Google

title: Uzbekistan and ZTE forge strategic partnership to accelerate digital transformation
snippet: ZTE and Ministry of Digital Technologies sign MoU at MWC 2026 to modernize telecom infrastructure and explore 6G, Wi-Fi 7/8, and satellite innovations Partner Content ZTE Corporation (0763.HK / 000063.SZ), a global lead…
contentText: ZTE and Ministry of Digital Technologies sign MoU at MWC 2026 to modernize telecom infrastructure and explore 6G, Wi-Fi 7/8, and satellite innovations Partner Content ZTE Corporation (0763.HK / 000063.SZ), a global leading provider of integrated information and communication technology solutions, announced the strengthening of its long-term partnership with the Republic of Uzbekistan. During the Mobile World Congress 2026, a high-level delegation led by H.E. Sherzod Shermatov, Minister of Digital Technologies of the Republic of Uzbekistan, visited the ZTE booth for official talks and signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU).…
